articles.title: Roelof Botha joins SpaceX’s board of directors - TechCrunch
articles.description: The former Sequoia Capital leader is filling an "existing vacancy" on SpaceX's board, days after the company went public in the largest IPO ever.
articles.content:
Former Sequoia Capital managing partner Roelof Botha is joining SpaceX’s board of directors, less than a week after the company went public in the largest IPO ever.

articles.title: After unveiling ridiculously expensive AR glasses, Snap’s stock takes a dive - TechCrunch
articles.description: Snap's long-awaited smart glasses debut hasn't exactly done wonders for the company's stock.
articles.content:
Snap’s long-awaited AR glasses, Specs, didn’t have the best debut.
The company’s stock hasn’t been on the healthiest trajectory lately. It’s dropped 30% over the past year. Following Specs’ launch, … [+1290 chars]
